title: Quantum computing threats to current cryptography: reality or hype (post-quantum cryptography presentation)
summary: NKSC Cyberpusryciai presentation on post-quantum cryptography, covering PQC algorithm selection, cryptographic inventory and testing for the transition to quantum-resistant algorithms.

title: Post-quantum cryptography
summary: NKSC news item presenting post-quantum cryptography as a key step in strengthening Lithuania's digital resilience and ensuring long-term security.

title: Digital Europe Programme calls (info day presentation)
summary: NKSC info-day presentation on Digital Europe Programme funding calls, including the deployment of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in systems across industrial sectors.

title: Guidelines for cryptography use inventory
summary: NKSC guidance on conducting a cryptographic inventory, explicitly referencing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as part of preparing for the quantum-resistant transition.

title: CTAC 2024 Yearly Report
summary: Yearly report published via Lithuania's NKSC discussing standardisation of quantum-resistant algorithms and the NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) project.

title: Overview of the cybersecurity status in Lithuania: key information
summary: NKSC overview of cybersecurity trends and statistics in Lithuania, identifying the transition to post-quantum cryptography as one of the most important decisions for the near future.

title: Ilgalaikiam saugumui – postkvantinė kriptografija: Vyriausybė patvirtino kryptį (For long-term security – post-quantum cryptography: Government approves the direction)
summary: Ministry of National Defence announcement that the Lithuanian Government approved a national plan/direction for transitioning to post-quantum cryptography, setting staged deadlines (cryptography inventory by 1 May 2027, post-quantum/hybrid in high-risk systems by 1 January 2031, PQC-only from 2036).

title: Postkvantinė kriptografija (Post-quantum cryptography)
summary: Official Ministry of National Defence post-quantum cryptography hub page describing PQC, the national transition plan and timeline, and pointing to the transition guidelines and cryptography inventory methodology prepared for organisations.

title: Ilgalaikiam saugumui – postkvantinė kriptografija: Vyriausybė patvirtino kryptį
summary: NKSC (lrv.lt government portal) news item announcing the Government-approved national post-quantum cryptography transition direction and the staged migration milestones for cybersecurity entities.

title: Nacionalinė kibernetinio saugumo būklės ataskaita 2025 (National Cybersecurity Status Report 2025)
summary: Annual national cybersecurity status report that explicitly addresses the quantum threat to public-key cryptography and the coordinated transition to post-quantum cryptography, including the NIS Cooperation Group PQC working group roadmap and Lithuania's national PQC coordination effort.

title: Artėja kvantinių kompiuterių era: kaip verslas turi apsaugoti savo duomenis nuo naujos kartos kibernetinių grėsmių (The quantum computing era is approaching: how business must protect its data)
summary: Ministry of National Defence article explaining post-quantum cryptography for organisations, describing the national PQC transition plan coordinated by the Ministry and the National PQC Coordination Working Group, with milestone dates (2027 inventory, 2031, 2036) and hybrid-cryptography recommendations.

title: NKSC Cyberpusryčiai: 2025 m. kibernetinių grėsmių apžvalga ir ko galime tikėtis (2025-11-25)
summary: NKSC Cyber Breakfast presentation reviewing 2025 cyber threats and 2026 priorities; flagged as a draft because an explicit post-quantum cryptography reference within this specific presentation file is not confirmed from search snippets.
